_comment: Notion property schema for the Job Tracker database. Used by setup wizard to create the DB; ALSO used by run-job-search Step P-3 to recreate the DB if it goes missing. Keep this single source of truth — do NOT inline the schema as DDL pseudocode anywhere else.
_v3_note: v3.0 introduces Match (categorical), Reasoning, Key Factors columns alongside legacy Score. Both forms coexist for backward compat: profiles without cv_json use legacy structured-rubric scoring (writes Score); v3 profiles use LLM-judged categorical (writes Match + Reasoning + Key Factors, sets Score=null). Match Quality + Feedback Comment columns ship in v3.0.0 for the learning loop.
